author: Siliconera
text:
FuRyu Making Demon Slayer Shinobu Figure and Nichirin Blade Replica Sword
Next month, a new Demon Slayer Shinobu Kocho noodle stopper figure and replica of her Nichirin blade sword will launch in Japan.

author: Siliconera
text:

The Witch Hat Atelier anime adaptation will continue, with season 2 streaming on Crunchyroll.

text:

The Demon Slayer: The Hinokami Chronicles 2 + Infinity Castle Character Pass will head to the Switch 2 this October.

author: Siliconera
text:
Review: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales
The Adventures of Elliot feels different and like an example of Square Enix taking a chance, and that’s why I loved this action-RPG.

author: Siliconera
text:
See You There, Beyond the Ocean Good Times Make Bad Times More Meaningful
See You There, Beyond the Ocean is a perfect example of cause and effect, with the highs and lows of a relationship shaping a life.
